title: Finding problems by condition text similarity
content: Use the 'searchByText' method to find problems that match a specific piece of condition text using fuzzy matching. This is ideal when you have the problem wording but not its ID. Provide the 'subject' and 'condition_text'. You can adjust the 'threshold' (0.0 to 1.0) to change how strict the matching is.
examples: Find a math problem that has this condition: 'Calculate the area of a circle with radius 5'.
Search for a biology problem similar to this: 'Describe the process of photosynthesis in plants'.
Are there any physics problems matching this description: 'A ball is thrown vertically upwards with initial velocity...'?
